title: Hou Hanshu: Book of the Later Han (Fan Ye), Selection 10
description: From Hou Hanshu: Book of the Later Han (Fan Ye): chapter 10
introduction: From Hou Hanshu: Book of the Later Han (Fan Ye): chapter 10

translation.text: From Hou Hanshu: Book of the Later Han (Fan Ye): A foundational chapter of one of China's official Twenty-Four Histories, recording the deeds, institutions, and biographies of an entire dynasty.
